calendar.matters:
1)Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee 2) Petition For Order For Settlement Of Account And Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees 3) Pe
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Vale for Petitioner.

The Court informed Mr. Vale that it received the declaration regarding fees but that it had not been reviewed. Mr. Vale stated that he was dropping the request for approval of the accounting and that he would get confirmation as to the name of the new Trustee. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

1)Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee 2) Petition For Order For Settlement Of Account And Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees 3) Pe
